name: Youtube Gallery
body:
### About plugin This jQuery plugin displays your Youtube videos as gallery with (or without) Fancybox integration. ### Copyrights This plugin is totally free to personal and comercial use. Use it the way as you want. If you improve the plugin, please let me know! ### Authors and Contributors This plugin was developed by Lucas Moreira (@moreirapontocom). ### Support or Contact Having trouble with the plugin? Send me an e-mail at . *** ### How to use **Step 1:** include the plugin files **Step 2:** initiate the plugin without options _#gallery:_ videos container **Step 3:** The HTML markup
**OPTIONAL PARAMETERS:** cover: [STRING] thumbnail image (see extras below) videoInfo: [BOOLEAN] display date and video author openInFancybox: [BOOLEAN] display video at new page (Youtube) or play in Fancybox autoplay: [BOOLEAN] autoplay video (only if openFancybox is true) texts: { post_date: [STRING] default text to date, post_author: [STRING] default text to author }, messages: { error: [STRING] default text to error } *** ### EXTRAS **How Youtube thumbnail works** XML : https://gdata.youtube.com/feeds/api/videos/[VIDEO ID]?v=2 EMBED : **Thumbnails** (h x w) 90 x 120 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/default.jpg (default quality) 180 x 320 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/mqdefault.jpg (medium quality) 360 x 480 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/hqdefault.jpg (high quality) 480 x 640 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/sddefault.jpg (slow quality) 90 x 120 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/1.jpg (default quality) 90 x 120 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/2.jpg (default quality) 90 x 120 http://i1.ytimg.com/vi/[VIDEO ID]/3.jpg (default quality)
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
